button.base: rounded-full font-bold transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 disabled:opacity-50 inline-flex items-center justify-center
button.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:shadow-none
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-900 px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(15,23,42,1)] hover:bg-pink-50 active:shadow-none

input.field: w-full rounded-full border-2 border-slate-900 bg-white px-6 py-4 text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-slate-900/20 font-medium transition-all
input.label: text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 ml-2

card.container: rounded-[32px] border-2 border-slate-900 bg-white p-8 shadow-[0_8px_0_0_rgba(15,23,42,1)] overflow-hidden relative

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border-2 border-slate-900 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold

visual_enhancers.decorations: Include purely decorative pink/yellow sparkles (SVG stars) scattered around empty space in the hero section.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Neo-brutalist style solid shadows (shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#0F172A]) on cards, inputs, and buttons to enhance the playful look.
visual_enhancers.borders: Thick 2px solid dark borders (border-slate-900) on all actionable or distinct surface elements to give an illustrative 'coloring book' feel.

hero_illustration.description: Engaged students in a diverse classroom raising hands. Use in hero section as the main visual.

decorative_sparkles.description: Abstract pink background element. Use at very low opacity (10-20%) as a background texture if needed, though pure #FFC0CB is preferred.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the #FFC0CB pink background and thick navy/slate-900 borders for all inputs, cards, and buttons.
All inputs and buttons MUST be pill-shaped (`rounded-full`).
Implement neo-brutalist solid drop shadows (`shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#0F172A]`) on buttons and cards to give it the requested playful, chunky vibe.
Use Fredoka (or similar rounded display font) for all headings, and Nunito for body text. Load them via Google Fonts in index.html.
For the Landing page: Add SVG sparkles/stars (4-point stars) around the hero text. You can use lucide-react 'Sparkles' icon customized.
For Daily Attendance: Use simple pill-shaped toggles or standard buttons for Present/Absent. No complex charts or analytics.
For Calendar View: Keep it simple. Highlight days where the student was present (green dot/background) vs absent (red dot/background).
Remember: Strict scope. DO NOT add analytics, charts, notifications, or AI.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles) for testing.
